verses.text: Hih bangin thu ka gen uh ciangin koleko a kiphattawm ka bang zel uh hiam? Midang pawlkhatte bangin note kiangah lahding mihoih hihna lai ka kisam kei uh a, note in zong kote nong lahding uh mihoih hihna lai a kisam na hi kei uh hi
Note mahmah pen mihoih ka hihna uh lahna dingin kote' lai na hi uh a, mi khempeuh in simin a theihna dingun kote' lungtang tungah a kigelh lai na hi uh hi

Hih lai pen Khrih mahmah in gelhin kote a hong puasak ahihna thu kitel mahmah hi. Laidal leh suangpek tungah laitui leh laikung tawh a kigelh hilo a, mihing lungtang tungah a nungta Pasian Kha Siangtho tawh a kigelh ahi hi
Khrih hangin Pasian muang ka hih manun hih bangin a hong gen ka hi uh hi
Hih bang sepzawhna dingin kote in siamna nei ung a ci hiloin, sepzawhna ding siamna pen Pasian hong piak ahi hi

Thuciamna thak nasem thei dingin kote tungah siamna a hong pia hi. Tua hong piakna pen lai-a kigelh thukham tawh hiloin Kha Siangtho tawh ahi hi. Bang hang hiam cih leh lai-a kigelh thukham in sihna piangsak a, ahi zongin Kha Siangtho in nuntakna hong pia hi

Thukham pen suangpek tungah a kigelh laimal hi a, a kipiak hunin Pasian' minthan'na tawh hong tonkhawm hi. Moses' maitang a taang mahmah pen mualkhin tei napi-in, nak taan'lua mahmah ahih manin Israel mite in Moses' maitang en zolo lai uh hi. Sihna a piangsak thei bek Thukham hong kipiak ciangin tuazah minthan' na vangtaang tawh hong kizui ahih leh
nuntakna a pia Kha Siangtho nasepna bangzahin minthan'na lian tawh hong kizuizaw kan ding ahi hiam
Mite mawhsakin thukhen nasepna-ah tuazahin minthan'na vangtaang om ahih leh mite dik hi, ci-in genkhiat nasepna-ah a minthan'na vangtaang lianzaw kan lai ding hi
Tuhunin a taang phazaw minthan'na vang hong omta ahih manin nidangin minthangin a vangtaang mahmah i cih pen a bei hong suak mai hi
Tawlkhat sung bek a kimang na in minthan'na nei ahih leh a kip tawntung na in minthan'na lianzaw nei kan ding hi
Hih bang lametna nei ka hih manun hangtakin a om ka hi uh hi
A maitang panin a vangtaang a beilam Israel mite in a muhkhak ding uh a deih lohna-in Moses in a maitang puan tawh a liah bangin a gamtate ka hi kei uh hi

Amaute' lungsim khauh ahih manin tudongin bangmah thei tuanloin om uh a, thuciamna lui laibu a sim uh ciangin puan tawh liah bangmahin bangmah mu theilo, thei theilo uh hi. Bang hang hiam cih leh mi khatpeuh Khrih tawh a kipawl ciang bekin a muhtheihna dingin a kiliahna puan a kilakhia pan ahi hi
Tuhun dongin amaute in Moses Thukham laibu a sim uh ciangin liahna puan in a lungsim uh a liah lai hi
Ahi zongin Lai Siangtho in, “Topa' mai-ah Moses a pai ciangin a kiliahna puan a lakhia hi,” a cih mah bangin Topa lamah mi khatpeuh a kihei ciangin a liah puan kilakhia hi
Hih lai munah Topa a cih pen Kha Siangtho hi a, Topa' Kha Siangtho a omna mun peuhpeuhah suahtakna om hi

Tua ahih manin eite khempeuh i maitang hong kiliah nawnloin Topa' minthan'na vangtaang i kilangsak hi. Topa kiang panin a hong pai Kha Siangtho ahi tua minthan'na vang in amah tawh a kibang dingin eite hong bawlpha a, minthan'na khat panin minthan'na sangzaw-ah hong omsak hi.
